2606.22445.title: DreamUV: Unwrap Artist-like UV by End-to-End Flow Matching
2606.22445.paper_summary: UV parameterization is a fundamental step in 3D content creation, yet producing production-ready UV layouts remains challenging due to the gap between geometric distortion objectives and the stylistic preferences of professional artists. While classical methods optimize handcrafted energy functions, artist-authored UVs exhibit structural patterns such as straightened seams, axis-aligned islands, and flexible interior deformation, properties that are difficult to explicitly formulate. In this work, we present DreamUV, an end-to-end learning framework that formulates UV unwrapping as a generative Flow Matching problem. Rather than predicting a single optimal parameterization, DreamUV learns a mesh-conditioned transport process that maps noise samples to a distribution of artist-like UV layouts. To reflect real-world authoring practices, we introduce a boundary-aware training strategy that prioritizes seam geometry, and a Model-in-the-Loop Finetuning(MITL) scheme that explicitly accounts for discretization errors during sampling and stabilizes transport dynamics under heterogeneous supervision. We evaluate DreamUV on a large-scale dataset of professionally authored UV layouts. Experiments demonstrate that our method produces significantly straighter boundaries and tighter axis-aligned islands than both classical and learning-based baselines, while maintaining competitive distortion metrics. Qualitative results and a user study with professional artists further confirm that DreamUV generates UV layouts that are not only valid, but aligned with practical production requirements.
2606.22445.paper_summary_zh: UV 參數化是 3D 內容創作中的基本步驟，但由於幾何扭曲目標與專業藝術家的風格偏好之間的差距，製作可用於生產的 UV 布局仍然具有挑戰性。雖然傳統方法優化手工製作的能量函數，但藝術家創作的 UV 展示出結構模式，例如拉直的接縫、與軸對齊的島嶼和靈活的內部變形，這些特性難以明確公式化。在這項工作中，我們提出了 DreamUV，一個將 UV 展開公式化為生成流匹配問題的端到端學習框架。DreamUV 不僅僅是預測單一最優參數化，而是學習一個網格條件的傳輸過程，將噪聲樣本映射到類似藝術家的 UV 布局分佈。為了反映現實世界的創作實踐，我們引入了一種邊界感知的訓練策略，優先考慮接縫幾何，以及一種模型迴路微調（MITL）方案，該方案明確考慮了採樣過程中的離散化誤差，並在異質監督下穩定傳輸動態。我們在一個大規模的專業創作 UV 布局數據集上評估了 DreamUV。實驗表明，我們的方法產生的邊界顯著更直，且與軸對齊的島嶼更緊湊，超過了傳統和基於學習的基準，同時保持了競爭力的扭曲指標。定性結果和與專業藝術家的用戶研究進一步確認了 DreamUV 生成的 UV 布局不僅有效，還符合實際生產需求。
2606.22445.author: Quanyuan Ruan et.al.
2606.22445.authors: Quanyuan Ruan, Jiabao Lei, Xingyi Du, Xifeng Gao
